alert_icon.componentleveltooltip: You have unlocked Oaths for this Pillar!

component_text.text: Devote [[img:icon_relics]][[/img]]Relics to any of the Three Pillars of Tiger Warrior culture to guide our people towards strength, order, and betterment.\n\nTo uphold these teachings is every Tiger Warrior's duty. Wherever we roam, the prophecies and wisdom of our forebears must burn undimmed within us.

The aptly named “Thunder-Crash Bombs” allow these specialist troops to devastate and disorient in equal measure. The aptly named “Thunder-Crash Bombs” allow these specialist troops to devastate and disorient in equal measure.
Devote a [[img:icon_relics]][[/img]]Relic to this Pillar to boost current effects and gain new ones.
Devote a [[img:icon_relics]][[/img]]Relic to this Pillar to activate the following effects:

turns_counter.componentleveltooltip: Turns until you can activate this position
This Oath will become available after the cooldown has expired.

component_text.text: This pillar is at maximum level
